settings.tagline: Advanced dermatology, laser, hair and aesthetic care in Dwarka, New Delhi.
settings.address: Twacha Skin Clinic, A Unit of MaxDermCare Skin and Laser Pvt. Ltd. Sector 12A, Dwarka, New Delhi
settings.heroTitle: Science-led skin, hair and laser care in Dwarka
settings.heroSubtitle: Founded in 2007 by Dr. Tapesh Sharma and Dr. Richa Sharma, Twacha Skin Clinic offers dermatologist-led consultations, advanced procedures and personalised treatment planning.
settings.aboutText: Twacha Skin Clinic is a centre for clinical dermatology and aesthetics in Dwarka, New Delhi. The clinic combines consultation chambers, procedure rooms, medical photography and trusted skincare guidance so patients can receive clear diagnosis-led care.

doctors.name: Dr. Tapesh Sharma
doctors.title: Co-founder and Medical Director
doctors.summary: Dr. Tapesh Sharma is a dermatologist and aesthetic physician with extensive experience in skin, hair and aesthetic treatments. He founded Twacha in 2007 and is known for face aesthetics, anti-wrinkle treatment and dermal fillers.
highlights: MBBS from SNMC, Agra and postgraduate Dermatology specialization from LLRM, Meerut.
Specializes in skin, hair and aesthetic treatments.
Active member of IACD, IADVL, ACSI and CDSI.
Regularly conducts lectures and training for dermatologists.
Uses modern technology to improve patient care and clinic workflows.

doctors.name: Dr. Richa Sharma
doctors.title: Co-founder and Medical Director
doctors.summary: Dr. Richa Sharma is a dermatologist with MBBS and MD Dermatology from Lady Hardinge Medical College, New Delhi. Her work spans hair disorders, aesthetic dermatology, patient-centred care and academic contribution.
highlights: Completed MBBS and MD Dermatology at Lady Hardinge Medical College.
Former lecturer at SRMS Medical College and consultant dermatologist.
Speaker and author in national and international dermatology forums.
Authored aesthetic dermatology chapters on anti-wrinkle treatment and fillers.
Member of AAD, IADVL, ACSI, CDSI and professional dermatology bodies.

doctors.name: Dr. Neha Gupta
doctors.title: Consultant Dermatologist
doctors.summary: Dr. Neha Gupta is a consultant dermatologist, aesthetic dermatologist and cosmetologist with experience in clinical dermatology, procedures, lasers and patient-centred skin care.
highlights: Holds MBBS, MD and DNB in Dermatology.
Experienced in patient consultations and dermatological procedures.
Skilled in skin surgeries, lasers, microneedling, PRP, chemical peels and radiofrequency surgery.
Active participant and presenter at dermatology conferences.
Known for a warm and patient-centred consultation style.

doctors.name: Dr. Prachi Gupta
doctors.title: Consultant Dermatologist
doctors.summary: Dr. Prachi Gupta is a consultant dermatologist, aesthetic physician and hair transplant surgeon with over 12 years of clinical experience. Her areas include anti-wrinkle treatment, skin boosters, lasers and aesthetic transformations.
highlights: M.B.B.S and D.D.V.L qualified in clinical and aesthetic dermatology.
Expertise in advanced skin and hair treatments.
Experienced hair transplant surgeon.
Regular attendee of dermatology workshops and aesthetic training programs.
Combines medical science with cosmetic precision.

services.title: Chemical Peels
services.excerpt: Medical chemical peels for acne-prone skin, dullness, pigmentation and texture concerns.
services.content: Chemical peels use selected exfoliating agents to improve skin tone, clogged pores, pigmentation and texture. At Twacha, peel strength and frequency are chosen after a dermatologist assesses skin sensitivity, sun exposure, medications and goals. The focus is safe, gradual improvement rather than exaggerated claims.
benefits: Helps improve dullness and uneven tone
services.metaTitle: Chemical Peels in Dwarka | Twacha Skin Clinic
services.metaDescription: Explore medical chemical peels at Twacha Skin Clinic, Dwarka for acne, pigmentation, dullness and texture after consultation.

services.title: Derma Clean
services.excerpt: Consultation-led derma clean care at Twacha Skin Clinic in Dwarka, New Delhi.
services.content: Derma Clean at Twacha Skin Clinic is planned after a dermatologist reviews your concern, skin or hair type, medical history and expectations. The clinic focuses on safe assessment, realistic counselling and clear aftercare instead of one-size-fits-all promises. Your doctor may recommend skincare, procedures, lasers, injectables or follow-up care depending on suitability.
services.metaTitle: Derma Clean in Dwarka | Twacha Skin Clinic
services.metaDescription: Consult Twacha Skin Clinic in Dwarka, New Delhi for derma clean with dermatologist-led assessment and guidance.

services.title: Hydrafacial
services.excerpt: Clinic-based facial treatments for cleansing, hydration and skin refreshment.
services.content: Hydrafacial and MediFacial services are designed to cleanse, exfoliate and hydrate the skin under clinic supervision. The session may be customised for dullness, congestion, oily skin or pre-event care. Twacha avoids one-size-fits-all facials and recommends suitable intervals based on skin condition.

services.title: Laser Hair Removal
services.excerpt: Dermatologist-guided laser hair reduction for long-term reduction of unwanted hair.
services.content: Laser hair reduction at Twacha is planned after a consultation that reviews skin type, hair growth pattern, medical history and expectations. The procedure uses controlled light energy to target hair follicles while protecting surrounding skin. Sessions are spaced according to hair growth cycles, and the dermatologist explains preparation, aftercare and maintenance clearly.

services.title: PRP
services.excerpt: Platelet-rich plasma therapy planned after hair and scalp evaluation.
services.content: PRP therapy uses processed platelets from the patient's own blood and may be recommended as part of a broader hair treatment plan. Suitability depends on diagnosis, severity, medical conditions and expectations. Twacha explains session intervals and expected response during consultation.
benefits: Part of a comprehensive hair plan

services.title: Hair Loss Treatment
services.excerpt: Diagnosis-led hair fall and hair thinning consultations with medical and procedural options.
services.content: Hair loss can be linked to genetics, nutrition, hormones, stress, scalp conditions or medical history. Twacha begins with diagnosis, then recommends medicines, scalp care, PRP or other procedures where appropriate. The clinic emphasises realistic treatment timelines and follow-up.

services.excerpt: Dermatologist-administered fillers for volume support, contours and facial harmony.
services.content: Dermal fillers may be considered for volume loss, lip definition, facial contours and selected lines. Patients are counselled about limitations and possible risks before treatment.

benefits: Custom plans for texture and tone

services.content: 3D Skin Analyzer at Twacha Skin Clinic is planned after a dermatologist reviews your concern, skin or hair type, medical history and expectations. The clinic focuses on safe assessment, realistic counselling and clear aftercare instead of one-size-fits-all promises. Your doctor may recommend skincare, procedures, lasers, injectables or follow-up care depending on suitability.
services.metaTitle: 3D Skin Analyzer in Dwarka | Twacha Skin Clinic
services.metaDescription: Consult Twacha Skin Clinic in Dwarka, New Delhi for 3d skin analyzer with dermatologist-led assessment and guidance.

testimonials.note: The consultation was clear and the doctor explained my treatment plan step by step.
